description_long: This is a young adult woman with a slender build, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. She is wearing a sleeveless, fitted dress with a flared skirt and a decorative bow on the left hip, giving her a summery and casual appearance. Her footwear consists of platform sandals, and she has a bracelet on her right wrist. Her hair is styled in two low pigtails, parted in the middle, and she has a choker necklace around her neck. The dress features a gradient color effect and subtle floral detailing. The overall look is relaxed and suitable for warm weather, suggesting she might be out for a stroll in an urban park or street.
description: A young woman in a sleeveless, flared dress with platform sandals and pigtail hairstyle, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. She has a casual, summery appearance with a decorative bow and bracelet.
description_view_0: Side view showing the profile of the woman, highlighting the fitted bodice, flared skirt, and platform sandals.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the symmetrical dress design, outstretched arms, and pigtail hairstyle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the other profile and the bow detail on the dress.
description_view_3: Rear view revealing the back of the dress, halter neck strap, and the full length of the pigtails.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless flared dress with halter neck and decorative bow
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length hair in two low pigtails
